live.title: 1st ODI - 29 Mar 2026
live.shortDescription: New Zealand Women and South Africa Women return to Hagley Oval for the 1st ODI, opening a fresh chapter in their limited‑overs battle. With both sides eager to set the tone early in the series, New Zealand will look to transfer home advantage and recent momentum into the longer format, while South Africa aim to reset, regroup, and strike first in conditions that demand discipline and adaptability. Tune in to catch all the action from the 1st ODI of South Africa Women's Tour of New Zealand 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.
live.longDescription: New Zealand Women and South Africa Women return to Hagley Oval for the 1st ODI, opening a fresh chapter in their limited‑overs battle. With both sides eager to set the tone early in the series, New Zealand will look to transfer home advantage and recent momentum into the longer format, while South Africa aim to reset, regroup, and strike first in conditions that demand discipline and adaptability. Tune in to catch all the action from the 1st ODI of South Africa Women's Tour of New Zealand 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.
